note: Implemented get_image_mimetype() on my end. IMPORTANT: my local copy of types.py does NOT show your normalize_image_bytes/binascii changes (I grepped, found nothing) - looks like we may be in separate sandboxes/working dirs rather than a shared filesystem, so our edits won't actually combine on disk. My diff only replaces the inline 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(self.image)...' block in image_to_base64 with a call to self.get_image_mimetype(), plus adds that new method (guards on image_mimetype not set AND self.image present, guesses via filetype, caches, returns).
